tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: STAYING FIT AND WELL
tasks.text: Living a 1.1. ________ lifestyle is important for people of all ages. Doctors recommend doing exercise 1.2. ________, such as walking or cycling, at least three times a week. Physical 1.3. ________ helps you stay in good shape and feel more energetic. Eating 1.4. ________ food gives your body the vitamins it needs. Being physically 1.5. ________ also improves your mood and brings 1.6. ________. Getting enough sleep is equally important because 1.7. ________ nights make it hard to concentrate at school. Eating junk food and avoiding exercise are 1.8. ________ habits that can damage your body over time. Remember that small changes in your daily routine can make a big difference to your well-being.
